text.title: RAG Bench Harness Template Core Rules
text.summary: 5 testable rules + 2 terminal conclusions every rag-bench-spec must enforce.

rule.statement: Corpus snapshot pinned by sha + size. Live corpus rejected.
Query set has gold labels (relevant doc ids per query). Free-text queries without labels rejected.
rule.rationale: Without gold labels, Recall@k and MRR cannot be computed.

rule.statement: Each retriever runner versioned (model name + commit / config hash). Unversioned runners rejected.
rule.rationale: Untracked runner versions produce non-reproducible bench numbers.

rule.statement: Metric set names ≥1 retrieval metric (Recall@k or MRR) + ≥1 generation metric (faithfulness or answer-relevancy) when end-to-end RAG.
rule.rationale: Retrieval-only metrics miss generation regressions; gen-only metrics miss retrieval ones.

rule.statement: Spec names a single accountable owner.
Recurring bench AND corpus committable AND query set has gold labels → run the 5-step procedure.
One-shot bench OR no committable corpus OR no gold labels → skip; use prior bench results.
